xl Brhat Samhiid
in Prdkrta by one Ifvara. His keen scientific attitude and mathe-
matical genius are revealed by his calculation and explanation of
the varieties of scents. He says that by Gaunavrtti, secondary method,
the number is 174,720. but primarily 43,680. In this connection he
quotes a long passage from a Mghantu of synonyms of substances.
This shows that he was well acquainted with Ayurveda also.
His profound scholarship in astronomy and mathematics is
attested to by the calculations and quotations he has given in
Chapter II.
